name: Girls of Sunset Place
overview: Five beautiful, young, hot, and sometimes very naughty Hollywood hopefuls are the newest faces of the Brentwood Talent agency and are invited to live at the agency's exclusive mansion at Sunset Place. These aspiring starlets must realize their potential to become a star. This is an opportunity of lifetime and a chance for their dreams to become reality.

trailers.title: Girls of Sunset Place Official Trailer
